---
title: "TUGAS PDM 1"
author: "Annisa Rizky Rarasati"
date: "2026-05-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(factoextra)
library(cluster)
library(pheatmap)
library(sf) 
library(rnaturalearth) 
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(viridis)
library(ggrepel)
library(countrycode)
```


```{r}
data <- read.csv("C:/Users/User/Documents/KULIAH/sem 4/pdm/data.csv",header=TRUE)
head(data)
```
```{r}
str(data)
```
```{r}
summary(data)
```
```{r}
# Preprocessing
# Menghapus spasi tersembunyi di awal/akhir nama negara
data$Country <- trimws(data$Country)

# Menyimpan daftar nama negara ke variabel terpisah
country <- data$Country

# Mendefinisikan kolom-kolom yang dijadikan variabel clustering (12 indikator)
features <- c(
  "SafetySecurity",              # Keamanan & Keselamatan
  "PersonelFreedom",             # Kebebasan Personal
  "Governance",                  # Tata Kelola Pemerintahan
  "SocialCapital",               # Modal Sosial
  "InvestmentEnvironment",       # Lingkungan Investasi
  "EnterpriseConditions",        # Kondisi Usaha
  "MarketAccessInfrastructure",  # Akses Pasar & Infrastruktur
  "EconomicQuality",             # Kualitas Ekonomi
  "LivingConditions",            # Kondisi Kehidupan
  "Health",                      # Kesehatan
  "Education",                   # Pendidikan
  "NaturalEnvironment"           # Lingkungan Alam
)

# Mengecek apakah semua variabel ada
setdiff(features, colnames(data))
```

```{r}
# Scalling Data

# Mengambil hanya kolom fitur dari dataframe
X <- data[features]

# Standarisasi menggunakan Z-score: (nilai - mean) / sd
X_scaled <- scale(X)

# Menetapkan nama negara sebagai row name pada data yang sudah di-scale
rownames(X_scaled) <- country
head(X_scaled)
```

```{r}
# Mencari K optimal
# Mendefinisikan rentang K yang akan diuji
K_range <- 2:10

# Menyiapkan vektor kosong untuk menyimpan hasil setiap K
inertias    <- numeric(length(K_range))  # menyimpan nilai inertia (Total WSS)
silhouettes <- numeric(length(K_range)) # menyimpan nilai silhouette score

# set.seed() memastikan hasil K-Means selalu sama setiap dijalankan
# karena K-Means menggunakan inisialisasi acak
set.seed(123)

# Looping untuk menjalankan K-Means di setiap nilai K
for (i in seq_along(K_range)) {
  k  <- K_range[i]

  # Menjalankan K-Means dengan k cluster
  # nstart = 25 → diulang 25 kali dengan titik awal berbeda, diambil hasil terbaik
  # iter.max = 100 → maksimal 100 iterasi konvergensi
  km <- kmeans(X_scaled, centers = k, nstart = 25, iter.max = 100)

  # Menyimpan total within-cluster sum of squares (inertia)
  # Semakin kecil inertia → data dalam cluster semakin homogen
  inertias[i] <- km$tot.withinss

  # Menghitung rata-rata silhouette score untuk semua data point
  # silhouette() menghasilkan nilai per baris, kolom ke-3 adalah skor-nya
    sil <- silhouette(km$cluster, dist(X_scaled))
  silhouettes[i] <- mean(sil[, 3])
}

# Tabel hasil
hasil_k <- data.frame(
  K = K_range,
  Inertia = round(inertias, 2),
  Silhouette = round(silhouettes, 4)
)

print(hasil_k)
```

```{r}
# Menentukan K terbaik berdasarkan silhouette tertinggi
best_k_sil <- K_range[which.max(silhouettes)]

# Menentukan K terbaik berdasarkan elbow (penurunan inertia terbesar)
diffs        <- diff(inertias)       # selisih inertia antar K berurutan
best_k_elbow <- K_range[which.min(diffs) + 1]  # K setelah penurunan terbesar

# Menampilkan rekomendasi
cat(sprintf("\n>> K terbaik (Silhouette tertinggi)      : K = %d (score = %.4f)\n",
            best_k_sil, max(silhouettes)))
cat(sprintf(">> K terbaik (Elbow - penurunan terbesar): K = %d\n", best_k_elbow))
cat(">> K YANG DIGUNAKAN: K = 3\n")
cat("   Alasan: Elbow menunjukkan penurunan inertia terbesar di K=3.\n")
cat("   K=2 silhouette-nya lebih tinggi tapi terlalu sedikit cluster\n")
cat("   untuk analisis 168 negara yang bermakna.\n")
```

```{r}
# Membuat plot Elbow dan Silhouette secara berdampingan
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))

# -- Plot Elbow --
plot(
  K_range,
  inertias,
  type = "b",
  pch = 19,
  col = "steelblue",
  lwd = 2,
  xlab = "Jumlah Cluster (K)",
  ylab = "Total Within SS",
  main = "Elbow Method (K=3)"
)

abline(v = 3, col = "red", lty = 2)
grid()

# -- Plot Silhouette --
plot(
  K_range,
  silhouettes,
  type = "b",
  pch = 19,
  col = "darkgreen",
  lwd = 2,
  xlab = "Jumlah Cluster (K)",
  ylab = "Silhouette Score",
  main = "Silhouette Method (K=2)"
)

abline(v = best_k_sil, col = "red", lty = 2)
grid()

```

```{r}
# KMEANS FINAL (K = 3)
k_opt <- 3

set.seed(123)

# Menjalankan K-Means final dengan K = 3
km_final <- kmeans(
  X_scaled,
  centers = k_opt,
  nstart = 25,
  iter.max = 100
)

# Menambahkan label cluster ke dataframe asli
# as.factor() → mengubah angka cluster menjadi kategori (factor)
data$Cluster <- as.factor(km_final$cluster)

head(data)
```

```{r}
# EVALUASI
cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("EVALUASI MODEL K-MEANS (K = 3)\n")
cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")

# -- Evaluasi 1: Silhouette Score --
# Mengukur seberapa mirip sebuah data dengan clusternya sendiri
# dibanding cluster lain. Rentang: -1 (buruk) sampai 1 (sempurna)
sil_obj <- silhouette(
  km_final$cluster,
  dist(X_scaled)
)

# dist() menghitung jarak Euclidean antar semua pasangan negara
sil_score <- mean(sil_obj[, 3])  # rata-rata skor semua data point

cat(sprintf("\n1. Silhouette Score       : %.4f\n", sil_score))
cat("   Interpretasi           : ")
if (sil_score >= 0.50) {
  cat("Struktur cluster KUAT (sangat baik)\n")
} else if (sil_score >= 0.25) {
  cat("Struktur cluster SEDANG (cukup baik)\n")
} else {
  cat("Struktur cluster LEMAH\n")
}

# -- Evaluasi 2: Explained Variance --
# Mengukur seberapa besar variasi data yang berhasil dijelaskan oleh cluster
# Between-SS → variasi ANTAR cluster (semakin besar semakin baik)
# Total-SS   → total variasi seluruh data
cat(sprintf("\n2. Within-Cluster SS      : %.2f\n", km_final$tot.withinss))
cat(sprintf("   Between-Cluster SS     : %.2f\n", km_final$betweenss))
cat(sprintf("   Total SS               : %.2f\n", km_final$totss))
cat(sprintf("   Explained Variance     : %.2f%%\n",
            km_final$betweenss / km_final$totss * 100))
cat("   Interpretasi           : Semakin tinggi % → pemisahan cluster makin baik\n")

# -- Evaluasi 3: Ukuran Tiap Cluster --
# Memeriksa apakah ukuran cluster seimbang atau ada yang terlalu kecil/besar
cat("\n3. Ukuran Tiap Cluster:\n")
for (c in 1:k_opt) {
  n <- sum(km_final$cluster == c)
  cat(sprintf("   Cluster %d : %d negara (%.1f%%)\n", c, n, n / nrow(data) * 100))
}

# -- Evaluasi 4: Silhouette Score per Cluster --
# Melihat cluster mana yang paling kohesif (nilai tertinggi = paling kompak)
cat("\n4. Silhouette Score per Cluster:\n")
for (c in 1:k_opt) {
  sil_c <- mean(sil_obj[sil_obj[, 1] == c, 3])
  cat(sprintf("   Cluster %d : %.4f\n", c, sil_c))
}

# -- Evaluasi 5: Davies-Bouldin Index --
# Mengukur rata-rata kemiripan tiap cluster dengan cluster yang paling mirip
# Rumus: rata-rata (Si + Sj) / dij, di mana Si = dispersi cluster, dij = jarak antar centroid
# Semakin KECIL nilai DB → cluster semakin baik terpisah (ideal < 1)
centers_mat <- km_final$centers  # koordinat centroid setiap cluster
db_vals     <- numeric(k_opt)

for (i in 1:k_opt) {
  # Hitung dispersi cluster i (rata-rata jarak anggota ke centroid)
  si <- mean(sqrt(rowSums(
    (X_scaled[km_final$cluster == i, ] -
       matrix(centers_mat[i, ], nrow = sum(km_final$cluster == i),
              ncol = ncol(X_scaled), byrow = TRUE))^2
  )))
  max_r <- 0
  for (j in 1:k_opt) {
    if (i != j) {
      sj  <- mean(sqrt(rowSums(
        (X_scaled[km_final$cluster == j, ] -
           matrix(centers_mat[j, ], nrow = sum(km_final$cluster == j),
                  ncol = ncol(X_scaled), byrow = TRUE))^2
      )))
      dij   <- sqrt(sum((centers_mat[i, ] - centers_mat[j, ])^2))  # jarak antar centroid
      max_r <- max(max_r, (si + sj) / dij)
    }
  }
  db_vals[i] <- max_r
}
db_index <- mean(db_vals)  # rata-rata semua cluster

cat(sprintf("\n5. Davies-Bouldin Index   : %.4f\n", db_index))
cat("   Interpretasi           : Semakin kecil semakin baik (< 1.0 = baik)\n")

# -- Ringkasan Evaluasi --
cat("\n", strrep("-", 60), "\n")
cat("RINGKASAN EVALUASI:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Silhouette Score       : %.4f  %s\n", sil_score,
            ifelse(sil_score >= 0.25, "[CUKUP BAIK]", "[LEMAH]")))
cat(sprintf("  Explained Variance     : %.2f%% %s\n",
            km_final$betweenss / km_final$totss * 100,
            ifelse(km_final$betweenss / km_final$totss * 100 >= 50,
                   "[BAIK]", "[Perlu ditinjau]")))
cat(sprintf("  Davies-Bouldin Index   : %.4f  %s\n", db_index,
            ifelse(db_index < 1.5, "[BAIK]", "[Perlu ditinjau]")))
cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")
```

```{r}
# VISUALISASI PCA 2D
# PCA (Principal Component Analysis) mereduksi 12 dimensi → 2 dimensi
# agar cluster bisa divisualisasikan dalam scatter plot 2D
pca_result <- prcomp(X_scaled, scale. = FALSE)
# scale. = FALSE karena data sudah di-scale sebelumnya

# Mengambil 2 komponen utama pertama (PC1 dan PC2)
pca_data <- as.data.frame(pca_result$x[, 1:2])
pca_data$Country <- country
pca_data$Cluster <- as.factor(km_final$cluster)

# Menghitung persentase variansi yang dijelaskan PC1 dan PC2
var_exp <- summary(pca_result)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100

# Warna untuk tiap cluster
colors_cluster <- c("1" = "#E74C3C", "2" = "#2ECC71", "3" = "#3498DB")

# Membuat scatter plot PCA dengan label nama negara
ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Cluster, label = Country)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +          # titik per negara
  geom_text(size = 2.2, vjust = -0.7,            # label nama negara
            alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_cluster) +  # warna manual per cluster
  labs(
    title = "Visualisasi Cluster Negara (PCA 2D)",
    x     = sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%% variance)", var_exp[1]),
    y     = sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%% variance)", var_exp[2])
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```

```{r}
# SILHOUTE PLOT
# Silhouette plot menampilkan skor per negara per cluster
# Bar panjang ke kanan = negara cocok di clusternya
# Bar pendek atau ke kiri = negara mungkin salah cluster
fviz_silhouette(sil_obj,
                palette    = c("#E74C3C", "#2ECC71", "#3498DB"),
                ggtheme    = theme_minimal()) +
  labs(title = "Silhouette Plot per Negara (K = 3)")
```

```{r}
# HEATMAP
short_names <- c("Safety", "Freedom", "Governance", "Social Capital",
                 "Investment", "Enterprise", "Market Access",
                 "Economic", "Living", "Health", "Education", "Environment")

# Menghitung rata-rata Z-score setiap fitur per cluster
# Nilai positif → di atas rata-rata global; negatif → di bawah rata-rata global
cluster_means <- t(sapply(1:k_opt, function(c) {
  colMeans(X_scaled[km_final$cluster == c, , drop = FALSE])
}))
rownames(cluster_means) <- paste("Cluster", 1:k_opt)
colnames(cluster_means) <- short_names

# Membuat heatmap dengan warna merah (rendah) → kuning → hijau (tinggi)
pheatmap(cluster_means,
         display_numbers = TRUE,      # tampilkan angka Z-score di tiap sel
         number_format   = "%.2f",    # format 2 desimal
         color = colorRampPalette(c("#E74C3C", "#FFFFCC", "#2ECC71"))(50),
         main            = "Karakteristik Rata-rata per Cluster (Z-score)",
         angle_col       = 45,        # label kolom dimiringkan 45 derajat
         fontsize        = 10,
         cluster_rows    = FALSE,     # urutan baris tidak di-cluster ulang
         cluster_cols    = FALSE)     # urutan kolom tidak di-cluster ulang
```

```{r}
# PROFIL & KARAKTERISTIK TIAP CLUSTER
# Menghitung rata-rata nilai ASLI (bukan Z-score) per cluster per fitur
cluster_profile <- data %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(features), mean, na.rm = TRUE))
# across() → terapkan fungsi mean ke semua kolom dalam features
# na.rm = TRUE → abaikan nilai kosong (NA) saat menghitung rata-rata

# Menghitung rata-rata global (semua negara) sebagai pembanding
overall_mean <- colMeans(data[features], na.rm = TRUE)

cat("\n", strrep("=", 65), "\n")
cat("KARAKTERISTIK TIAP CLUSTER\n")
cat(strrep("=", 65), "\n")

for (c in 1:k_opt) {
  negara <- country[km_final$cluster == c]  # daftar negara di cluster ini
  cat(sprintf("\n%s\n", strrep("-", 65)))
  cat(sprintf("CLUSTER %d  (%d negara)\n", c, length(negara)))
  cat(strrep("-", 65), "\n")
  cat("Negara:", paste(negara, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  cat("\nRata-rata Indikator:\n")
  for (feat in features) {
    val <- as.numeric(cluster_profile[cluster_profile$Cluster == c, feat])
    # Bandingkan nilai cluster dengan rata-rata global
    tag <- ifelse(val > overall_mean[feat], "↑ di atas rata-rata", "↓ di bawah rata-rata")
    cat(sprintf("  %-32s : %7.2f  (%s)\n", feat, val, tag))
  }
}

cat(sprintf("\n%s\n", strrep("-", 65)))
cat("Rata-rata Global (pembanding):\n")
for (feat in features) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-32s : %7.2f\n", feat, overall_mean[feat]))
}
```

```{r}
# RINGKASAN HASIL CLUSTERING
cat("\n", strrep("=", 65), "\n")
cat("RINGKASAN HASIL CLUSTERING\n")
cat(strrep("=", 65), "\n")
for (c in 1:k_opt) {
  negara <- country[km_final$cluster == c]
  cat(sprintf("\nCluster %d (%d negara):\n", c, length(negara)))
  cat(paste(negara, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
```

```{r}
# DATAFRAME PETA
cluster_df <- data.frame(
  Country = country,
  Cluster = as.character(km_final$cluster),
  Score = data$AveragScore
)

# Menghitung rata-rata tiap variabel pada setiap cluster
tabel_cluster <- data %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(features),
      ~ round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
    )
  )

# Menghitung rata-rata
rata_global <- data %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(features),
      ~ round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
    )
  )

# Menambahkan label
rata_global <- cbind(
  Cluster = "Global",
  rata_global
)

# Menggabungkan tabel cluster 
tabel_perbandingan <- bind_rows(
  tabel_cluster,
  rata_global
)

tabel_perbandingan
```

```{r}
# Ranking cluster berdasarkan rata-rata skor
cluster_rank <- cluster_df %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_score = mean(Score, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(mean_score)

cluster_rank
```

```{r}
# LABEL CLUSTER BERDASARKAN SKOR
cluster_df <- cluster_df %>%
  mutate(
    Cluster_Label = case_when(
      Cluster == cluster_rank$Cluster[1]
      ~ "Cluster Rentan",

      Cluster == cluster_rank$Cluster[2]
      ~ "Cluster Berkembang",

      Cluster == cluster_rank$Cluster[3]
      ~ "Cluster Sejahtera"
    )
  )

cluster_df
```

```{r}
# PETA DUNIA
# Ambil peta dunia
world <- ne_countries(
  scale = "medium",
  returnclass = "sf"
)

# Data cluster
map_data <- cluster_df %>%
  mutate(
    Country = trimws(Country),

    # Ubah nama negara menjadi kode ISO3
    iso3 = countrycode(
      Country,
      origin = "country.name",
      destination = "iso3c",

    # Perbaikan manual negara yang gagal / ambigu
      custom_match = c(
  "Guyana" = "GUY"), warn = FALSE
)
      )


# Cek negara yang gagal dikonversi
map_data %>%
  filter(is.na(iso3))

# Join menggunakan ISO3
map_cluster <- world %>%
  left_join(
    map_data,
    by = c("iso_a3" = "iso3")
  )

# Cek hasil join
table(is.na(map_cluster$Cluster))
```

```{r}
# VISUALISASI 
ggplot(map_cluster) +

  geom_sf(
    aes(fill = Cluster_Label),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Cluster Rentan" = "#E74C3C",
      "Cluster Berkembang" = "#F1C40F",
      "Cluster Sejahtera" = "#2ECC71"
    ),
    na.value = "gray90",
    name = "Cluster"
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Peta Dunia Hasil Clustering",
    subtitle = "K-Means Clustering Berdasarkan Prosperity Index",
    caption = "Abu-abu = data tidak tersedia"
  ) +

  theme_minimal() +

  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 16,
      hjust = 0.5
    ),

    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5
    ),

    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```
